lyrics.text: Hola chica
You got that fuego, fuego and you know I need ya
lyrics.translation: 你热辣似火，你知道我想拥有你

lyrics.text: Now luego girl right now I need to see ya
Go upstairs and we can drink some that sangria
lyrics.translation: 随我上楼，我们可以喝几杯桑格利亚汽酒

lyrics.text: Yeah
Babe it's too true
Every guy up in this club is looking at you
lyrics.translation: 房间里的每个人都在悄悄看你

lyrics.text: I know I'm a little shy and ain't got tattoos
lyrics.translation: 我知道我有点害羞，身上也没有酷酷的纹身

lyrics.text: But I'ma try my luck and holla at you
lyrics.translation: 但我要和你打个招呼，试试运气

lyrics.text: Yeah
You got that big, big bubble butt
Better keep my mouth shut
I'll just watch you do your thing
Sippin' on that pink champagne, yeah
lyrics.translation: 品味着粉红色的香槟，耶

lyrics.text: Girl, go to work
